name: Marcus Garvey
description: Jamaica-born British political activist, Pan-Africanist, orator, and entrepreneur (1887-1940)
abstract: Marcus Mosiah Garvey Jr. (17 August 1887 – 10 June 1940) was a Jamaican political activist.

about_quotes.speaker: Albert Jiles
about_quotes.evidence: Well that was altogether different. When this came up about those Jew makers didn't have any passports, this was at the time before that, Martha Garvey had what they call a store line club.

about_quotes.speaker: Jo Jones
about_quotes.evidence: there has never been nobody from Marcus Garvey up that ever loved the black man like Lester Young

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Barbarin
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] You remember what Marcus Garvey used to look like, huh? ... [INTERVIEWEE] Um...

about_quotes.speaker: David Albert Francis
about_quotes.evidence: The UNIA -- Universal Negro Improvement Association, which was founded by Marcus Garvey.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Wormworth
about_quotes.evidence: I think there always was a Civil Rights movement. Marcus Garvey.
